Title: Provides for network participation verification and disclosure
Summary: Requires health care providers to verify and disclose their in- or out-of-network status with a prospective patient's health plan.
LawCode: Add §§25 & 4406-j, Pub Health L; add §§3217-k & 4306-j, Ins L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law and the insurance law, in relation to network participation verification and disclosure
